name: Weihai Huadong Automation Co., Ltd
summary: Weihai Huadong Automation Co., Ltd develops, manufactures, and sells CNC systems, CNC machine tools, and related parts in China. Its products include cylindrical grinding machines; surface grinders; vertical and horizontal milling machines; gantry grinding and milling machines; milling machines; and functional accessories. The company was founded in 2002 and is based in Weihai, China.
